data.body: AC2 EVIDENCE (feature/* triggers CI post-fix) — PROVEN: change 200 on feature/s3-ci2 (pushed AFTER the replication fix was deployed) produced a CI dispatch (message 'STARTED: github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/28644216042') and a cast Verified vote. Contrast: PRE-FIX change 198 on feature/s3-ci had NO STARTED message and NO Verified (dispatch 422'd on the unreplicated ref). So the fix makes g2p's workflow_dispatch(ref=refs/heads/feature/..) resolve -> gerrit-verify.yaml runs -> Verified is cast. (200's Verified was -1 because the throwaway commit had no rebar-ticket trailer — the ticket-trailer gate correctly failing a bad commit, further proving the pipeline. Getting a clean Verified+1 next.)
